description: Documentation-only public class location policy. Runtime public eligibility is enforced by scripts.public_class_eligibility.is_public_class_location.
notes: Do not add page-specific exact-location allowlists.
Do not infer public status from Shipyard, Wilmington, available seats, active status, price, course type, or booking URL.
Private/non-public locations must still be allowed to block occupancy internally, but must not be published or receive public booking links.
